product_visual_description: Cellulare mini GSM 2G di dimensioni estremamente ridotte (6,8 × 2,5 × 1,5 cm), corpo bianco lucido con bordi arrotondati e scocca interna/cornice giallo-verde fluorescente (#C8FF00). La foto reference mostra il telefono aperto in tre componenti: corpo principale aperto sul retro (con vano dual SIM in acciaio visibile e LED giallo), batteria rimovibile rettangolare bianca/dorata da 380mAh, e cover posteriore bianca con doppia griglia speaker. Materiale plastico lucido, forma ovale ultra-compatta, colore predominante bianco con accento giallo limone vivace. Texture liscia con griglie metalliche speaker. Aspetto giocoso e tecnologico al tempo stesso.
global_rule:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photos of the GiDaCom Mini Telefono GSM 2G Dual SIM.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTOS.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.

THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.

IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE FOR THIS JOB: LOGO_PROVIDED
- If LOGO_MODE == NO_LOGO: DO NOT ADD ANY LOGO, BRAND NAME, WATERMARK, OR PLACEHOLDER TEXT. DO NOT LEAVE EMPTY SPACE RESERVED FOR A LOGO — fill the full composition.
- If LOGO_MODE == LOGO_PROVIDED: follow the LOGO INTEGRATION RULES. The logo is the SECOND image_input (only for images 02, 04, 06, 09). For the other 6 images, behave exactly as NO_LOGO.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER', or similar AS TEXT in the image.

ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.

IMAGE 01A — HERO SFONDO BIANCO:

STEP 1 — EXTRACT THE PRODUCT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO:
Take the pixel-perfect cutout of the GiDaCom Mini Telefono GSM 2G showing ALL THREE components from the reference: the main body open (rear facing up, yellow-green #C8FF00 inner frame, dual SIM slots visible, yellow LED), the rectangular battery (white/gold, 380mAh label visible), and the white rear cover. Arrange them in a clean, slightly angled flat-lay composition centered in the frame — three pieces elegantly spread to show the complete kit.

STEP 2 — BACKGROUND:
Pure white background RGB(255,255,255). Absolutely nothing else. No gradients, no shadows extending beyond the product, no text, no logos, no watermarks, no graphic elements, no borders. A very subtle natural drop shadow directly under each component only (opacity max 8%, blur radius 12px) to give slight grounding. The product fills approximately 70-75% of the 2000x2000px canvas, centered both horizontally and vertically.

NEGATIVE: No text. No logo. No colored backgrounds. No effects on the product itself.

IMAGE 01B — HERO CON EFFETTO ENERGY BURST:

Pixel-perfect cutout of the GiDaCom Mini Telefono GSM 2G Dual SIM, showing all three components (main body open with yellow-green #C8FF00 inner frame, dual SIM slots, yellow LED; rectangular battery white/gold; white rear cover) arranged in the same elegant flat-lay spread as the reference. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 02 — BENEFIT PRINCIPALE:

Background: deep dark navy #0F1923 solid, with a very subtle repeating diagonal micro-grid pattern in #C8FF00 at 4% opacity covering the full canvas. A faint radial vignette darkening the corners to #070C10.

LEFT 55% of canvas: pixel-perfect product cutout from reference (the three components — open body, battery, rear cover — in an elegant spread, slightly angled for dynamism). Product centered vertically in the left half. A very subtle #C8FF00 elliptical glow ONLY behind the product (strictly behind, not on it) at 20% opacity, radius 300px.

RIGHT 45% of canvas:
TOP section: headline text in bold white, uppercase:
"IL PIÙ PICCOLO
DEL MONDO"
Font size: large, 2 lines, #FFFFFF. Below it a thin horizontal separator line #C8FF00, full width of right column.

Below separator, 5 benefit items, each on its own row with thin #1E2D3D separator between rows:
✓ [#C8FF00 bold checkmark] "Dimensioni ultra-compatte 6,8 cm" [#FFFFFF]
✓ [#C8FF00 bold checkmark] "Dual SIM + slot microSD 16 GB" [#FFFFFF]
✓ [#C8FF00 bold checkmark] "Bluetooth per chiamate e SMS" [#FFFFFF]
✓ [#C8FF00 bold checkmark] "Auricolare Bluetooth integrato" [#FFFFFF]
✓ [#C8FF00 bold checkmark] "Lettore MP3 e registrazione chiamate" [#FFFFFF]

Each benefit: checkmark bold #C8FF00, text bold white, subtext in #8899AA small below main text. Row height equal, evenly distributed.

BOTTOM-LEFT corner: small size badge — pill shape #C8FF00 background, dark text: "6,8 × 2,5 cm" in bold dark navy #0F1923. Padding 60px from bottom, 60px from left.

Fill the entire canvas — no empty corners.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

Card 4 (bottom-right): 🎧 icon 80px + bold white title: "Come auricolare BT" — 52px + subtext #888888: "Indossalo al collo o all'orecchio" — 36px

BOTTOM CENTER: pixel-perfect product cutout (all three components in compact horizontal arrangement, width 600px) centered. Below it: #C8FF00 bold text: "6,8 cm · 100 g · Dual SIM · Bluetooth · MP3" — 36px.

Full 2000×2000px canvas filled with content.

images.name: Garanzia e Trust
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photos of the GiDaCom Mini Telefono GSM 2G Dual SIM.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTOS.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: LOGO_PROVIDED — the logo is the SECOND image_input. Apply logo as per LOGO PLACEMENT instructions at the end of this prompt.
NEVER write 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER' anywhere.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 09 — GARANZIA E TRUST:

Background: very dark navy #0A0F1E with a faint repeating shield-and-check micro-pattern in #C8FF00 at 4% opacity covering the full canvas. Outer frame: 6px solid #C8FF00 border at 24px inset from canvas edge.

TOP CENTER:
Pill badge #C8FF00 background, #0A0F1E bold text: "ACQUISTO SICURO" — 44px.
Below: main title in #FFFFFF bold: "LA TUA FIDUCIA È LA NOSTRA PRIORITÀ" — 68px, centered, 2 lines if needed.
Thin #C8FF00 separator line below title.

2×2 GRID of 4 trust badge cards, occupying center 55% of canvas height:

Card 1 (top-left) — background #101828, border 2px #C8FF00 rounded 20px:
🛡️ icon #C8FF00 80px
"GARANZIA 2 ANNI" bold #FFFFFF 52px
"Prodotto certificato e testato" #888888 36px

Card 2 (top-right) — same style:
🚀 icon #C8FF00 80px
"SPEDIZIONE RAPIDA" bold #FFFFFF 52px
"Consegna veloce in tutta Italia" #888888 36px

Card 3 (bottom-left) — same style:
✅ icon #C8FF00 80px
"QUALITÀ CERTIFICATA" bold #FFFFFF 52px
"Standard internazionali GSM" #888888 36px

Card 4 (bottom-right) — same style:
💬 icon #C8FF00 80px
"ASSISTENZA ITALIANA" bold #FFFFFF 52px
"Supporto clienti dedicato" #888888 36px

BOTTOM CENTER: pixel-perfect product cutout (assembled compact form, width 400px) centered. Below product: bold #C8FF00: "Il più piccolo. Il più affidabile." — 44px italic.

Fill entire 2000×2000px — no empty corners, no reserved placeholder space anywhere except for the logo in bottom-right as specified.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

negative_prompt: No redrawn product. No illustrated or cartoon style product. No product recreated from scratch. No glow or color effect applied directly ON the product. No shape or proportion alteration of the product. No background effects touching, overlapping, or bleeding onto the product. No text in English (except brand names if inevitable). No supplier brand names or logos. No placeholder text like 'LOGO HERE', '[BRAND]', 'LOGO CLIENTE', 'YOUR LOGO', 'BRAND HERE'. No empty rectangular or circular space intentionally left blank for a logo. No watermarks, no signatures, no trademark symbols. Do not write the word 'LOGO' anywhere in the image.
